name: Cream Cheese Triangles (Lekvar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Work the cream cheese, butter, and flour together as you would for a pie crust.
2. Moisten the mixture with sweet cream.
3. Knead the dough lightly until it is smooth.
4. Wrap the dough in waxed paper and place it in the refrigerator overnight.
5. Dust a work surface with flour and sugar.
6. Roll out the dough on the floured surface.
7. Cut the rolled-out dough into squares.
8. Place a small spoonful of lekvar or any desired filling in one corner of each square.
9. Fold over the dough, pressing the corners slightly to seal.
10. Bake in a moderate oven until lightly browned.
11. Allow the baked triangles to cool completely.
12. Dust with powdered sugar for serving.
13. Store in an uncovered container to maintain crispness.
